data.name: 盒中少女
data.detailed_description:
◆故事


前略，我終於入手了一個盒中少女。
她還沒受過任何養成，恐怕一出來就會想逃跑吧。
但是沒關係，我已經準備充足。
一定要把她養成我喜歡的樣子.......

◆玩法


這是一個養成盒中少女的遊戲，請把少女變成你心中的模樣吧
一天有早上和晚上兩個時段，每個時段都可以進行一次行動
飽腹度，服從度，忍耐度，上限為10，歸0會觸發Gameover
行動有四種，每種類共有三個不同事件，每種事件都會分別增加/減少以上三種數值並消耗一個行動
同時每個行動會纍積四種養成值
行動事件中的各種選項並不會影響行動數值，選項有各種顏色，避免選擇不想要的內容
數值超過15就可以選擇解鎖該行動的結局，共有四個結局

◆遊戲特色


◇24張基本CG，包含差分480張以上
◇一位主要女角
◇養成題材遊戲
◇遊戲結局：4種

data.short_description: 可以對盒中少女這樣那樣，有著各式動態的的互動小品遊戲。 前略，我終於入手了一個盒中少女。 她還沒受過任何調教，恐怕一出來就會想逃跑吧。 但是沒關係，我已經準備充足。 一定要把她調教成我喜歡的樣子.......
data.supported_languages: 簡體中文, 英文, 日文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Boxed Girl
data.detailed_description:
◆Story


I finally got my hands on a girl in a box.
She hasn't had any training yet, so I'm afraid she'll try to run away as soon as she comes out.
But it doesn't matter, I'm well prepared.
I'm going to train her to my liking.......

◆Gameplay


This is a game to raise a girl in a box, please make the girl into the shape of your heart!
There are two periods in a day, morning and evening, and you can perform one action in each period.
Satiety, Obedience, and Endurance are capped at 10 and will trigger a Gameover if they reach 0.
There are four types of actions, each with three different events, each of which will increase/decrease the values of the above three and consume an action.
Each action accumulates four values.
The options in the action events don't affect the value of the action, and the options are color-coded to avoid selecting unwanted content.
When the value exceeds 15, you can choose to unlock the ending of the action, there are a total of four endings.

◆Game Features


◇ 24 base CGs, with over 480 variations
◇ One main female character
◇ A training simulation (raising) themed game
◇ Multiple endings: 4 different outcomes

data.short_description: It's an interactive mini-game where you can do this or that to the girl in the box, with all sorts of dynamic actions. I finally got my hands on a girl in a box. She hasn't had any training yet, I'm well prepared to train her to my liking.......
data.supported_languages: Simplified Chinese, English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese
